statusReason: Source, runtime URL, baseline settings/candidate screenshots, and an additional multilingual Indonesian-main settings/candidate/dictionary screenshot set were captured. The multilingual dictionary screenshot targets the third candidate 呢, scrolls down, then moves across that candidate cell so the richer lower dictionary entries are visible.

browserCapture.browser: Google Chrome via Playwright Chromium launcher

screenshots.evidence: Runtime page after network idle and settings section visible.
Controlled textarea input `nei` produced a visible candidate panel.

screenshots.limitation: Candidate panel captured, but dictionary panel did not appear from controlled hover/move automation. A second touch-enabled attempt could not get a usable candidate button bounding box. Dictionary structure remains source-backed from DictionaryPanel.tsx and CandidateInfo.ts.

screenshots.evidence: Runtime page with all Display Languages enabled and Indonesian selected as main language.
Controlled textarea input `nei` with English, Hindi, Indonesian, Nepali, and Urdu enabled; Indonesian is the main language.
Scrolled down, then moved the mouse across the third candidate cell for 呢, showing canonical reference, written-form rows, literary reading note, part-of-speech, and lower More Languages details.

runtimeObservation.dictionaryHoverBehavior: The Web alpha intentionally requires mouse movement over a candidate, not merely a stationary pointer, before showing the dictionary panel. The replacement dictionary screenshot scrolls down first, then moves across the third candidate cell for 呢.

attemptedCommandsAndTools: Playwright Chromium launch with viewport 1280x720 and Chrome executable C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe
Playwright textarea input `nei`, screenshot capture for settings and candidate panel
Playwright hover/mousemove/touchstart attempts for dictionary panel screenshot

Initial Playwright multilingual capture enabled all display languages, selected Indonesian as main language, typed `nei`, and moved the mouse over the first candidate cell before capturing the dictionary panel.

Playwright replacement capture selected the row containing third candidate 呢 and moved the mouse across its candidate cell before replacing dictionary-detail-multilingual-indonesian-main-desktop-1280x720.png.

accessLimitations.detail: Local TypeDuck-Web source is available, but the worktree is dirty, including modified files and submodule changes.
The original baseline dictionary-detail screenshot remained partial, but an additional multilingual Indonesian-main dictionary screenshot was captured after moving over a concrete candidate cell.

privacyNotes: Candidate input used controlled sample text `nei` only.
No personal typed content or local user data was captured intentionally.
No production source, installer, registry, protocol, runtime path, or release workflow files were modified.
